expectations.text: Report contains findings from at least 2 distinct search legs
expectations.evidence: Section 1 'Tabela Comparativa por Perna' explicitly shows 3 legs: Leg 1 (Gemini), Leg 4 (SCite/Consensus), Leg 5 (PubMed/Opus). Each leg has independent findings.

expectations.text: Report includes a comparative table or cross-leg comparison section
expectations.evidence: Section 1 has 'Tabela Comparativa por Perna' with 9 findings compared across 3 legs, including convergence ratings (ALTA 3/3, MODERADA 2/3, BAIXA 1/3).

expectations.text: Report identifies at least 1 convergence OR divergence between search legs
expectations.evidence: Section 3 has 7 convergences (5 FORTE, 2 MODERADA). Section 4 has 5 divergences with structured Position A vs Position B analysis.

expectations.text: Report contains at least 3 PMIDs or DOIs with verification status
expectations.evidence: Section 2 has 6 VERIFIED PMIDs: 30910320, 35120736, 35661713, 40396591, 24291366, 16298014. All verified via PubMed MCP with full citation data.

expectations.text: Report includes concrete effect sizes with confidence intervals
Report includes results from SCite and/or Consensus MCP queries
expectations.evidence: Leg 4 section: SCite returned 10 papers with Smart Citations. Consensus returned 10 papers (after 502 retry). Section 6 details raw data from each MCP.

expectations.text: Report does NOT contain vague claims without specific citation
expectations.evidence: Every clinical claim includes PMID, DOI, or MCP source. Numbers table (Section 5) has PMID for each data point. CANDIDATE PMIDs explicitly flagged.
